title: Policies - Canada.ca
content:
These policies are an interpretation of the purpose and intent of the Food and Drugs Act and Medical Devices Regulations.
- Classification of products for moxibustion: Notice to stakeholders [2022-03-14]
- Notice: Static Magnets Sold as Medical Devices [2017-03-31]
- Notice - Release of information about Medical Device Investigational Testing Applications Authorized by Health Canada [2013-11-14]
- Drug/Medical Device Combination Products Policy [2005-11-30]
- Policy on Drug/Medical Device Combination Products - Decisions [2014-07-22]
